# IKImageBrowserDropBefore

**Global Variable**

Drop the item before the cell.

## Declaration

```swift
var IKImageBrowserDropBefore: IKImageBrowserDropOperation { get }
```

## Constants

- **IKImageBrowserDropOn**: Drop the item on the cell.
